ddls:
CREATE TABLE "facilities" (
  "facility_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each facility */,
  "facility_name" TEXT /* Name of the facility */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the facility */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the facility */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the facility */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the facility */,
  "facility_manager" TEXT /* Name of the facility manager */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("facility_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "machines" (
  "machine_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each machine */,
  "facility_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the facility where the machine is installed */,
  "machine_name" TEXT /* Name of the machine */,
  "machine_type" TEXT /* Type of the machine */,
  "installation_date" TEXT /* Date the machine was installed */,
  "manufacturer" TEXT /* Manufacturer of the machine */,
  "model" TEXT /* Model of the machine */,
  "serial_number" TEXT /* Serial number of the machine */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("machine_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_machines_machine_type FOREIGN KEY ("machine_type") REFERENCES machine_types ("machine_type_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_machines_facility_id FOREIGN KEY ("facility_id") REFERENCES facilities ("facility_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sensors" (
  "sensor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sensor */,
  "machine_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the machine where the sensor is installed */,
  "sensor_type" TEXT /* Type of the sensor (e.g., temperature, pressure) */,
  "sensor_name" TEXT /* Name of the sensor */,
  "installation_date" TEXT /* Date the sensor was installed */,
  "accuracy" REAL /* Accuracy of the sensor */,
  "calibration_interval" INTEGER /* Interval between calibrations */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sensor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sensors_sensor_type FOREIGN KEY ("sensor_type") REFERENCES sensor_types ("sensor_type_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sensors_machine_id FOREIGN KEY ("machine_id") REFERENCES machines ("machine_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_points" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data point */,
  "sensor_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the sensor that collected the data */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the data collection */,
  "temperature" REAL /* Temperature reading */,
  "pressure" REAL /* Pressure reading */,
  "light_intensity" REAL /* Light intensity reading */,
  "humidity" REAL /* Humidity reading */,
  "fault_count" INTEGER /* Number of faults detected */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the data was collected */,
  "data_quality_flag" INTEGER /* Flag for data quality (1 = good, 0 = bad) */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Comments about the data point */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_points_sensor_id FOREIGN KEY ("sensor_id") REFERENCES sensors ("sensor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "faults" (
  "fault_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each fault */,
  "machine_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the machine where the fault occurred */,
  "fault_description" TEXT /* Description of the fault */,
  "fault_date" TEXT /* Date the fault was detected */,
  "resolved_date" TEXT /* Date the fault was resolved */,
  "resolved_by" TEXT /* ID of the user who resolved the fault */,
  "severity" TEXT /* Severity of the fault (e.g., high, medium, low) */,
  "root_cause" TEXT /* Root cause of the fault */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("fault_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_faults_machine_id FOREIGN KEY ("machine_id") REFERENCES machines ("machine_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., operator, engineer, admin) */,
  "facility_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the facility the user is associated with */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department of the user */,
  "job_title" TEXT /* Job title of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_facility_id FOREIGN KEY ("facility_id") REFERENCES facilities ("facility_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role FOREIGN KEY ("role") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role (e.g., read, write, admin) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sensor_types" (
  "sensor_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sensor type */,
  "sensor_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the sensor type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the sensor type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sensor_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "machine_types" (
  "machine_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each machine type */,
  "machine_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the machine type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the machine type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("machine_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "facility_maintenance" (
  "maintenance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each maintenance record */,
  "facility_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the facility where maintenance was performed */,
  "maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date the maintenance was performed */,
  "maintenance_type" TEXT /* Type of maintenance (e.g., routine, emergency) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the maintenance */,
  "performed_by" TEXT /* ID of the user who performed the maintenance */,
  "cost" REAL /* Cost of the maintenance */,
  "materials_used" TEXT /* Materials used during the maintenance */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("maintenance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_facility_maintenance_facility_id FOREIGN KEY ("facility_id") REFERENCES facilities ("facility_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "machine_maintenance" (
  "maintenance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each maintenance record */,
  "machine_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the machine where maintenance was performed */,
  "maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date the maintenance was performed */,
  "maintenance_type" TEXT /* Type of maintenance (e.g., routine, emergency) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the maintenance */,
  "performed_by" TEXT /* ID of the user who performed the maintenance */,
  "cost" REAL /* Cost of the maintenance */,
  "materials_used" TEXT /* Materials used during the maintenance */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("maintenance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_machine_maintenance_machine_id FOREIGN KEY ("machine_id") REFERENCES machines ("machine_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sensor_maintenance" (
  "maintenance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each maintenance record */,
  "sensor_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the sensor where maintenance was performed */,
  "maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date the maintenance was performed */,
  "maintenance_type" TEXT /* Type of maintenance (e.g., routine, emergency) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the maintenance */,
  "performed_by" TEXT /* ID of the user who performed the maintenance */,
  "cost" REAL /* Cost of the maintenance */,
  "materials_used" TEXT /* Materials used during the maintenance */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("maintenance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sensor_maintenance_sensor_id FOREIGN KEY ("sensor_id") REFERENCES sensors ("sensor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data point accessed or modified */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the action */,
  "action" TEXT /* Type of action (e.g., view, edit, delete) */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the action */,
  "log_level" TEXT /* Level of the log (e.g., debug, info, warning, error) */,
  "log_message" TEXT /* Message describing the log entry */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_logs_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES data_points ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the notification */,
  "message" TEXT /* Message content of the notification */,
  "recipient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user receiving the notification */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_recipient_id FOREIGN KEY ("recipient_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "facility_performance" (
  "facility_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the facility */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the performance metric */,
  "performance_metric" TEXT /* Name of the performance metric (e.g., production rate, energy consumption) */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the performance metric */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("facility_id", "timestamp", "performance_metric")
)

CREATE TABLE "machine_performance" (
  "machine_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the machine */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the performance metric */,
  "performance_metric" TEXT /* Name of the performance metric (e.g., production rate, energy consumption) */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the performance metric */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("machine_id", "timestamp", "performance_metric")
)
